content.full_text:
February 5, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
General Counsel
Attn: Kathy Donovan
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Donovan:

I am writing for advice on how I may dispose of the funds left from my last election bid in June 1988. I have less than $2,000. in funds left in my campaign account and have not received or spent any funds since the end of 1988.

There are two applications that I have considered for the use of these funds:

1. The purchase of office equipment, most particularly a computer and related equipment, for use in my duties as county supervisor.

2. Sending of information letters to the constituents of my supervisorial district.

Please advise if the above expenditures would be appropriate and provide any other related information that I would need for disposing of my campaign funds properly.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Gary H. Lemke,
Lassen County Supervisor
